Section.Name: Detail
Section.OnPrint: ' -- style script start detail.BackColor = iif(_styleCtr mod 2 = 0, rgb(255,255,255),rgb(240,240,240)) _styleCtr = _styleCtr + 1 ' -- style script end

Field.Name: lbl1Name1
Field.Text: 商品编号 商品名称,规格型号

Field.Name: lbl1Name2
Field.Text: 商品编号 商品名称,规格型号

Field.Name: lblTitle1
Field.Text: 中华人民共和国海关出口货物报关单

Section.Name: Detail
Section.OnPrint: ' -- style script start detail.BackColor = iif(_styleCtr mod 2 = 0, rgb(255,255,255),rgb(240,240,240)) _styleCtr = _styleCtr + 1 ' -- style script end

Section.Name: Detail
Section.OnPrint: ' -- style script start detail.BackColor = iif(_styleCtr mod 2 = 0, rgb(255,255,255),rgb(240,240,240)) _styleCtr = _styleCtr + 1 ' -- style script end

Field.Name: lbl3SellerDescC
Field.Text: 双方同意按下列条款由买方出售，买方购进下列货物：

Field.Name: lbl3SellerDescE
Field.Text: THE SELLERS AGREE TO SELL AND THE BUYERS AGREE TO BUY THE UNDER MENTIONED GOODS ON THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS STATED BELOW:

Section.Name: Detail
Section.OnPrint: ' -- style script start detail.BackColor = iif(_styleCtr mod 2 = 0, rgb(255,255,255),rgb(240,240,240)) _styleCtr = _styleCtr + 1 ' -- style script end

Section.Name: Detail
Section.OnPrint: ' -- style script start detail.BackColor = iif(_styleCtr mod 2 = 0, rgb(255,255,255),rgb(240,240,240)) _styleCtr = _styleCtr + 1 ' -- style script end

Field.Name: lbl5Sign1
Field.Text: 兹声明以上报告无讹并承担法律责仕 监管场所（签章）:

Field.Name: lbl5Sign2
Field.Text: 监管场所经办 人员签章:
